summary: Foreman Codex dispatches are plain successor handoffs or coordination tasks.

allowed_payloads.description: Plain successor-Foreman handoff or state compression payload.
examples: Continue Foreman work from this handoff and inspect the current repo state before acting.

allowed_payloads.description: Plain coordination, review, or routing task.
examples: Review the latest GDI completion report and route the next bounded step.

forbidden_prompt_shapes.description: Foreman successor handoffs should stay plain unless a future provider contract says otherwise.

loop_recovery_guidance: Read current repo and coordination state before selecting the next action.
